parameters.filterByFormula: AND({Status}="Completed", {Email}!="", {Review Requested}!=TRUE(), DATETIME_DIFF(TODAY(), {Event Date}, 'days')>=2, DATETIME_DIFF(TODAY(), {Event Date}, 'days')<=14)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { from: 'Tuned Yota <events@send.tunedyota.events>', to: [$json.to], reply_to: 'info@tunedyota.com', subject: $json.subject, html: $json.html, text: $json.text } }}
